news.t: First Trust Expands ETF Lineup with Launch of Three New Target Outcome Strategy ETFs

overview.description: The FT Vest Laddered Enhance & Moderate Buffer ETF (BUFX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds, which holds a laddered portfolio of 12 FT Vest U.S. Equity Enhance & Moderate Buffer ETFs. BUFX was launched on Jun 24, 2025 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: First Trust Expands ETF Lineup with Launch of Three New Target Outcome Strategy ETFs
data.text: WHEATON, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Trust Advisors L.P. (“First Trust” or “FTA”), a leading provider of exchange-traded funds (“ETFs”) and outcome-based strategies, announced the launch of three new...
